# Wise Goose Games

> Two-person independent game studio based in California, creating thoughtfully designed puzzle games that respect players' intelligence.

## Pathways & Poltergeists

> A spatial puzzle game where players build pathways from polyomino pieces to guide ghost friends home. 83 hand-crafted puzzles across 7 mechanical zones. Looks cozy. Plays hard.

- Genre: Spatial Puzzle
- Price: $9.99 USD
- Release Date: February 27, 2026
- Platforms: Steam (Windows & macOS), iOS, Android
- Languages: 16 supported including Japanese and Korean
- Players: Single-player

### Key Mechanics

Players rotate and place 3D polyomino pathway pieces onto a grid to construct routes. Ghosts automatically pathfind along connected tiles once a valid path exists. Seven mechanical zones introduce new systems: basic pathing, obstacles, waypoints, teleporters, switches/gates, multi-ghost coordination, and combined systems.
